Brard, Cyprien Prosper; Minéralogie appliquée arts histoire minéraux sont employés dans l'agriculture, l'économie domestique, médicine; fabrication sels, combustibles métaux; l'architecture décoration; peinture dessin; arts mécaniques; bijouterie joaillerie.
volumes, F.G. Levrault, Paris, 1821.
Octavo, volume
viii, 696, engraved folded plates.
Volume
491, engraved plates.
Volume
524, engraved plates colored).
modern cloth, x-lib.
with smudge mark lower edge spines, light moderate foxing first four pages each volume, small discard stamp sheets.
very good condition.
Brard; 1788-1838 French mineralogist, economic geologist.
studied mineralogy under Bronignart, while still student published Manuel Minéralogiste Géologue Voyageur (Paris, 1805).
made extensive tour foot Alpes Switzerland Central Europe studying geology mineralogy, 1808 became aide Faujas.
Brard appointed director copper mines Servoz 1813 where first anthracite coal fuel.
1816, entered into franchise that created glassware factory Lardin.
noted contributions mineralogy also understanding stratigraphy Paris Basin.
?Brard's Minéralogie appliquée major treatise economic mineralogy.
Within provides descriptions various mineral substances, deposits, their uses.
second covers minerals used fuels.
third covers those minerals with applications medicines which includes "remedies imagination".
fourth part covers edible minerals.
fifth part Brard treats architectural stones, i.e.
marbles, granites, paving stones, alabasters, serpentines also their quarrying shaping.
sixth part covers those minerals used pigmentation drawing.
seventh part, Brard describes those minerals used ceramics, glazing, refactories, abrasives polishing agents, i.e.
diamond.
eighth final part devoted gemstones.
contains descriptions their properties, classes them according value.
Identification tables provided well plates showing faceted stones, carved works lapidary equipment.

measure defines imposes requirements noncollecting retailers, referrers, sales facilitators great detail, summarized below.
Starting Aug. once referrer cumulatively receives more than $10,000 from commissions, fees, other compensation, must comply with notification requirement.
Within days meeting that threshold, referrer must notify retailers that their sales subject Rhode Island sales tax.

Article Erica Berman, PhD, scoop family fitness Toronto.
After what seemed like particularly long brutal winter, spring finally here many Toronto feel like we're coming long period hibernation.
This often means that we've spent much time couch little time being active.
Even when weather cooperates, it's difficult most people carve time exercise, this particularly true parents.
Keeping active, however, doesn't have complicated, should, ideally involve kids.
Community centres like Miles Nadal JCC, Wallace Emerson, West YMCA favorite recreation facilities that will mind your little ones while fit.
have preschoolers pre-teens, your kids moving with same time?
Junior offer wide variety fitness classes training children adults.
Krudar Muai Thai Kensington Market holds Muai Thai class children every Saturday while simultaneously running both spinning boot camp classes grown-ups.
have teens, find activity enjoy make quality time.
conventional fitness activities don't appeal, about badminton, martial arts, paddle boarding roller derby?
When comes family fitness gym, fancy equipment scheduled classes essential: city full outdoor spaces too!
Simply taking walk with added resistance stroller, wagon baby carrier great exercise moms dads.
regularly take your kids park then watch while they play, missing prime opportunity active.
around playground, burpees jumping jacks, bring skipping rope hula hoop (one latest fitness crazes!)?
whole family have while getting together.
Parks also great, safe places walking, running cycling family there many wonderful options Toronto: Withrow Riverdale parks East End, Cedarvale, Christie Pits, Trinity Bellwoods West, and, course, High Park.
Tracks, particular, perfect spots everyone exercise: kids cycle scooter without danger cars nearby, parents walk while keeping close their little ones.
area, Earlscourt park, located just south Joseph Picinnini Community Centre, beautiful outdoor track, maybe your kids' school that's right your doorstep.
going around around circles your idea fun, than enjoy exploring nature instead: Toronto fabulous waterfront ravine trails, Beach boardwalk, unique Evergreen Brickworks lands walk hike.
best ways build exercise into your life leave your garage much possible.
Walk ride bicycles school, work, daycare grocery store instead.
Even your kids small, there myriad options allowing them safely ride your bicycle.
only cycling great exercise, it's inexpensive environmentally friendly mode transportation too!
it's your kids need motivation moving, offer them incentive their bikes walk park: picnic lunch grass, visit animals High Park Zoo, many splash pads around city.
Another strategy that works with kids include their friends.
Offer pick friend park turn into playdate.
Remember, fitness should family affair!
What your favourite ways build family fitness into your life routine?

once brought kids with tracks they hooked.
